What is FastDDL?

FastDDL is a temporary encrypted file sharing service with a unique transparency angle.

Key features:

entry.title: Lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
Lissy93 commented on Lissy93/dashy#1832 · May 2, 2026 06:37
Lissy93 commented May 2, 2026
Versions now have a new patch tag for every update, as well as regular releases for larger updates. https://dashy.to/updates :)
